title: bromus hordeaceus var. glabrescens
intro: Bromus hordeaceus var. glabrescens is a plant species, commonly known as soft brome, which is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Bromus hordeaceus var. glabrescens include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and decoctions, which are typically made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a medicinal tea.
